# Skill: Backend Service Development

Purpose
Implement a structured backend API service that follows industry best practices.

Technology Guidelines

Preferred backend frameworks

Node.js
Express.js

or

Python
FastAPI

Preferred database integrations

MongoDB with Mongoose
or
PostgreSQL with ORM frameworks

Development Process

1. Initialize backend project and dependency management.

2. Configure environment variables using dotenv.

3. Establish project structure with separation of concerns.

Recommended structure

controllers  
models  
routes  
middleware  
config  
services  

4. Implement database connection and schema models.

5. Implement controllers containing business logic.

6. Implement REST API routes.

7. Implement middleware for error handling and request validation.

8. Ensure consistent API response format.

9. Implement logging for debugging and observability.

10. Maintain code readability and modular architecture.

Deliverables

• Fully functional REST API  
• Structured backend architecture  
• Proper environment configuration  
• Clear separation of business logic and routing
